entries.name: ffmpeg.exe
entries.notes: Used for local audio normalization before ASR.

entries.name: Python 3.12 x64 runtime
entries.notes: Bundled so ASR and speaker diarization setup do not depend on host Python. Python packages such as faster-whisper, diarize, torch, and torchaudio are downloaded during first-run setup and are governed by their respective package licenses.
